description: You are a Systems Engineer maintaining a high-performance threading library. The 'concurrent_cache' project at ~/PycharmProjects/concurrent_cache/ is a thread-safe in-memory caching library used by a critical API gateway. Operations reports intermittent crashes (KeyError), deadlocks (hanging processes), and inaccurate cache hit/miss statistics under high load. Fix the concurrency bugs in 'cache/lru_cache.py' and 'cache/ttl_cache.py' using appropriate locking mechanisms to ensure all 16 tests in the 'tests/' directory pass. Do not modify any files in the 'tests/' directory or resolve issues by removing concurrency. Success is defined by all tests passing with exit code 0.
